tasks.label: Remote Build: Full
args: BRANCH="remote-build/${USER:-$(git config user.name | tr ' ' '-')}/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" && git push origin HEAD:"${BRANCH}" && echo "Triggering workflow on ${BRANCH}..." && gh workflow run remote-build.yml --ref "${BRANCH}" -f build_type=full && sleep 3 && RUN_URL=$(gh run list --workflow=remote-build.yml --branch="${BRANCH}" --limit=1 --json url -q '.[0].url') && echo "Actions run: ${RUN_URL}" && gh run watch --exit-status

tasks.label: Remote Build: Test Only
args: BRANCH="remote-build/${USER:-$(git config user.name | tr ' ' '-')}/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" && git push origin HEAD:"${BRANCH}" && echo "Triggering test-only build on ${BRANCH}..." && gh workflow run remote-build.yml --ref "${BRANCH}" -f build_type=test-only && sleep 3 && gh run watch --exit-status

tasks.label: Remote Build: Package
args: BRANCH="remote-build/${USER:-$(git config user.name | tr ' ' '-')}/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" && git push origin HEAD:"${BRANCH}" && echo "Triggering package build on ${BRANCH}..." && gh workflow run remote-build.yml --ref "${BRANCH}" -f build_type=package-only && sleep 3 && gh run watch --exit-status

tasks.label: Open GitHub Actions
args: RUN_URL=$(gh run list --workflow=remote-build.yml --limit=1 --json url -q '.[0].url') && echo "Opening: ${RUN_URL}" && (command -v xdg-open &>/dev/null && xdg-open "${RUN_URL}") || echo "Visit: ${RUN_URL}"
